title: lathyrus macrorrhizus var. pyrenaicus
intro: Lathyrus macrorrhizus var. pyrenaicus, also known as the Pyrenean or French everlasting pea, is a perennial legume plant belonging to the pea family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs and bronchitis, and soothing skin irritations. Lathyrus macrorrhizus var. pyrenaicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although its safety and efficacy may vary depending on the preparation and individual tolerance.
